hooks.command: { read -r json; f=$(echo "$json" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'genai-engine/ui/src/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then repo_root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); cd "$repo_root/genai-engine/ui" && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true && node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix --cache --cache-location node_modules/.cache/eslint "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
